### Test Checklist

<!-- Check all tests completed -->

- [ ] Engine loads successfully without crash
- [ ] Completed at least 1 full game
- [ ] PGN import / export works (if applicable)
- [ ] UI renders correctly in light and dark themes
- [ ] Orientation change (portrait/landscape) works without issues
- [ ] App state preserved after background/foreground transition
- [ ] Stable during extended use (>15 minutes)

## Pre-Submission Checklist

<!-- Ensure all items are checked before submitting -->

- [ ] Code follows the project style guide (Java / JavaScript)
- [ ] All changes tested on a **physical Android device**
- [ ] Commit history is clean and follows Conventional Commits
- [ ] Branch is synced with the latest `dev` branch (`git rebase dev`)
- [ ] No hardcoded secrets, passwords, or other sensitive data
- [ ] New third-party libraries declared in NOTICE file (if applicable)
- [ ] New files include AGPL v3 + GPL v3 copyright header (if applicable)

---

## License Confirmation

By submitting this PR, I agree to the following:

- [ ] I confirm that this contribution is my own original work, or that I have obtained authorization from the original author to submit it
- [ ] I agree to release this contribution under the **AGPL v3 + GPL v3** dual license
- [ ] I confirm that this contribution does not infringe any third-party intellectual property or other rights
